bird.summary: The rufous-breasted wood quail (Odontophorus speciosus) is a species of bird in the family Odontophoridae. It is found in Bolivia, Ecuador,…

locations.name: 玻利維亞
locations.summary: 玻利維亞多民族國（西班牙語：Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia），通稱玻利維亞，是位於南美洲中西部的內陸國家，與巴西、秘魯、智利、阿根廷、巴拉圭五國接壤，亦為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國；其法定首都為蘇克雷，但實際上…

locations.name: 安地斯山脈
locations.summary: 安地斯山脈（西班牙語：Cordillera de los Andes；奇楚亞語：Walla Antikuna）是地球陸地上最長的山脈，位於南美洲的西岸，約7,000公里長 (或8,900公里长)，200至700公里寬（最寬的部份在南緯18…

relations.subject: Rufous-breasted wood quail
relations.evidence: It is found in Bolivia, Ecuador, and Peru primarily on the east side of the Andes between 800 and 2000m in elevation (higher in Peru). Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
